priority_flags: ⚑ Displaced Student — May Need Extra Support

agent3.summary: The student demonstrates a good academic record with a strong 1st semester GPA, but their 2nd semester performance shows a slight dip.

interventions.action: Encourage the student to review their course load and workload to ensure they are managing their time effectively.
interventions.when: After the student completes their current semester

interventions.action: Offer resources on time management and study skills, such as workshops or online tools.
Provide information on academic support services, such as tutoring or writing centers, to help the student improve their academic performance.
interventions.when: After the student completes their first semester

agent3.message_to_student: Keep up the good work!  We're here to support you in achieving your academic goals.
